# [PUB-01] Whitepaper PDF upload to existing Zenodo DOI

**Local plan ID:** `#11` (placeholder).
**Track:** PUB-01.
**SIP section:** §5.
**Labels:** `track:PUB`, `area:publication`, `r5:target`, `type:docs`.

## Goal (target)

Produce a consolidated whitepaper PDF that cites **only**
[`BENCHMARKS.md`](../../BENCHMARKS.md) MEASURED rows, and upload it as
a new sub-record under the existing DOI
`10.5281/zenodo.19227877`. No new DOI is minted by this issue.

## Scope

- Author the PDF from sources already in repo
  ([`WHITEPAPER.md`](../../WHITEPAPER.md),
  [`LINEUP.md`](../../LINEUP.md),
  [`BENCHMARKS.md`](../../BENCHMARKS.md),
  [`CLARA_TRACEABILITY.md`](../../CLARA_TRACEABILITY.md)).
- No restatement of `28–120 TOPS/W` outside its `projection` framing.
- Upload to Zenodo as a sub-record; record the new sub-DOI in
  [`CHANGELOG.md`](../../CHANGELOG.md).

## Done when

- [ ] PDF posted as a sub-record of `10.5281/zenodo.19227877`.
- [ ] `WHITEPAPER.md` Whitepaper-artefacts table updated.

## Anti-claims

- No paper-acceptance claim (sub-record on Zenodo is a deposit, not peer-review).
- No new DOI minted; only sub-records of the existing DOI.
